rationale: The cited paper introduces a method for constructing product/search maps from behavioral co-view data (hierarchical asymmetric MDS), and the citing paper is also a market-structure mapping method built from behavioral basket co-occurrences. In the citing note, the authors explicitly position their work as extending prior product-map research and benchmarking against established methods, so this citation is plausibly methodological/foundational rather than an incidental mention.
